$comment: Allowlist of intentional API changes from v1 → v2. The API-contract diff test at build time treats differences listed here as expected and fails on any other divergence. Adding to this list requires an approved design decision in CHANGELOG.md.

TreeMenuProps.name: cacheSearch
TreeMenuProps.reason: Leaky abstraction tied to fast-memoize arg-identity caching. Replaced internally by useMemo keyed on real dependencies — correct by default, no user-facing knob.

addedExports.name: TreeMenuHandle
addedExports.reason: Imperative handle type for the `useImperativeHandle` ref shape. Additive — consumers who don't use refs aren't affected.

addedExports.name: TreeMenuClassNames
addedExports.reason: Per-slot CSS class names appended to the default `rstm-*` anchors. Enables headless Tailwind-style usage without importing the default CSS.

addedExports.name: TreeMenuLabels
addedExports.reason: i18n-friendly label overrides for the default UI (search placeholder / aria-label).

TreeMenuProps.classNames: Optional per-slot class names appended to the default `rstm-*` anchors (M4.5c).
TreeMenuProps.labels: Optional i18n-friendly copy overrides for default UI strings (M4.5d).
